zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard De Clyfton Baron Clifton of Goosnarth於1402年出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾普雷斯頓時，他的父親Thomas Clifton Esq.24歲，母親Agnes Molyneux18歲。他於大約1427年與Alice Butler在英國藍卡爾古斯納結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1490年在英國英格蘭藍卡爾古斯納享年88歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard De Clyfton Baron Clifton of Goosnarth于1402年出生在英国英格兰藍卡爾普雷斯頓时，他的父亲Thomas Clifton Esq.24岁，母亲Agnes Molyneux18岁。他于大约1427年与Alice Butler在英国藍卡爾古斯納结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1490年在英国英格兰藍卡爾古斯納享年88岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Clyfton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the very numerous places called Clifton, from Old English clif ‘slope’ (see Cliff ) + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

variants.name: Cliff
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places called Cliff(e), Cle(e)ve, or Clive, from Old English clif ‘slope, bank, cliff’, or a topographic name from the same word. The Old English word was used not only in the sense of modern English cliff but also of much gentler slopes and frequently also of a riverbank or seashore.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

en.lifeSummary: When Richard De Clyfton Baron Clifton of Goosnarth was born in 1402, in Preston, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas Clifton Esq., was 24 and his mother, Agnes Molyneux, was 18. He married Alice Butler about 1427, in Goosnargh, Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died in 1490, in Goosnargh, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 88.

Il a épousé Alice Butler environ 1427, à Goosnargh, Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé en 1490, à Goosnargh, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 88 ans.

ko.Clayton-le-Moors, Lancashire, England, U: 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 클레이턴 일 무르스
ko.lifeSummary: Richard De Clyfton Baron Clifton of Goosnarth(이)가 1402년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 프레스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Clifton Esq.(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Molyneux(은)는 18세였다. 그는 대략 1427년 영국 랭카실르 구스나르그h에서 Alice Butler(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1490년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 구스나르그h에서 88세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard De Clyfton Baron Clifton of Goosnarth nasceu em 1402, em Preston, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Clifton Esq., tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Molyneux, tinha 18 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Butler aproximadamente 1427, em Goosnargh, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1490, em Goosnargh, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 88 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard De Clyfton Baron Clifton of Goosnarth родился в 1402 г. в местности престон, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas Clifton Esq. было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Agnes Molyneux, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Butler около 1427 г. в местности гуснарг, ланкашир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер в 1490 г. в местности гуснарг, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 88 лет.
